scripts.audit: node scripts/audit-honesty.mjs && node scripts/eval-letter-v2.mjs && node scripts/eval-letter-crisis-gate.mjs && node scripts/eval-inbox-alerts.mjs && node scripts/eval-acknowledgment.mjs && node scripts/eval-entry-date.mjs && node scripts/eval-crisis-resources.mjs && node scripts/eval-voice-confidence.mjs && node scripts/eval-voice-vocabulary.mjs && node scripts/eval-backfill-runner.mjs && node scripts/check-ack-reflect-gate.mjs
scripts.build: npm run audit && node scripts/check-public-assets.mjs && node scripts/gen-crisis-json.mjs && vite build
